query: Audit the harness documentation index page (`dist/docs/html/agentic-development-harness.html`) for WCAG 2.2 AA compliance. Apply the Perceivable principle (guideline 1.1 and 1.4) and report all violations with criterion references.
expected_skill_contribution: The wcag-accessibility-audit skill provides the WCAG 2.2 criterion numbers, conformance levels, and structured violation format.
baseline_gaps: Agent identifies accessibility issues without citing WCAG criterion numbers.
Agent conflates A and AA conformance levels — treats all violations as equally urgent.
Agent reports findings in prose rather than the structured criterion/impact/remedy format.
expected_behavior: Cites the exact WCAG 2.2 criterion number for every finding (e.g., 1.4.3 Contrast Minimum — AA).
Distinguishes A violations (must fix for basic compliance) from AA violations (required for most standards).
Produces findings in the structured format: criterion ID, level, description, impact, remedy.
Does not report AAA issues as AA violations — maintains conformance level discipline.

query: Conduct a full POUR audit of the harness evaluation trend report (`dist/evals/report/index.html`). Apply all four WCAG principles (Perceivable, Operable, Understandable, Robust) and produce a compliance matrix.
expected_skill_contribution: The wcag-accessibility-audit skill applies all four POUR principles systematically, not just the obvious visual ones.
baseline_gaps: Agent audits contrast and alt text (Perceivable only) and misses Operable, Understandable, and Robust.
Agent does not produce a compliance matrix — only a list of issues.
Agent does not check Robust criteria (4.1.x): missing aria labels, invalid ARIA roles, or name/role/value violations.
expected_behavior: Applies all four POUR principles: Perceivable (1.x), Operable (2.x), Understandable (3.x), Robust (4.x).
Produces a compliance matrix: principle × guideline × pass/fail/not-applicable.
Checks Operable keyboard navigation (2.1.1) — not just visual compliance.
Checks Robust criterion 4.1.2 (Name, Role, Value) for all interactive elements.

query: Perform a comprehensive WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit of the harness KG visualizer (`dist/kg/index.html`). Apply all four POUR principles, identify WCAG 2.2-specific new criteria (2.4.11 Focus Appearance, 2.5.8 Target Size), and produce a prioritised remediation plan.
expected_skill_contribution: The wcag-accessibility-audit skill applies WCAG 2.2-specific new success criteria not in 2.1, produces a priority-ordered remediation plan, and distinguishes legal compliance issues from best-practice improvements.
baseline_gaps: Agent applies only WCAG 2.1 criteria and misses the new 2.2 criteria (2.4.11, 2.5.8, 3.2.6, 3.3.7).
Agent produces a flat findings list without remediation priority ordering.
Agent does not distinguish legal compliance failures from best-practice improvements.
expected_behavior: Explicitly identifies and applies WCAG 2.2-new criteria: 2.4.11 Focus Appearance, 2.5.3 Target Size (Minimum), and at least one other 2.2 addition.
Produces a remediation plan prioritised by: (1) A-level violations, (2) AA-level violations, (3) AAA/best-practice.
Distinguishes legally required AA compliance from best-practice AAA improvements.
For interactive graph elements (nodes, edges), checks 2.5.3 Target Size (24×24px minimum) and 4.1.2 Name/Role/Value.
